requirement_topic.en: Algeria EV Charger Market Access, IANOR Conformity, and Regulatory Context
requirement_topic.zh: 阿尔及利亚EV充电设备市场准入、IANOR合格评定与监管背景
requirement_topic.zht: 阿爾及利亞EV充電設備市場准入、IANOR合格評定與監管背景

summary.en: Algeria's EV charging market is still nascent compared with mature EU and GCC charging networks. Market access should be handled case by case through the importer, IANOR standards and conformity route, customs documentation, CREG-regulated electricity context, Sonelgaz grid coordination, and any public- or fleet-project tender requirements. Because a single official EVSE-specific mandatory certification route could not be confirmed from official sources as of 2026-06-14, exporters should avoid claiming automatic Algeria readiness and should instead build an Algeria technical file around IEC 61851, IEC 62196, IEC 61000, local labels and manuals, import classification, and site-approval evidence.
summary.zh: 与成熟的欧盟和海湾充电网络相比，阿尔及利亚EV充电市场仍处于早期阶段。市场准入应通过进口商、IANOR标准与合格评定路径、海关文件、CREG监管的电力环境、Sonelgaz电网协调，以及任何公共或车队项目招标要求逐案处理。截至2026年6月14日，未能从官方来源确认单一、专门针对EVSE整机的强制认证路径，因此出口商不应宣称自动满足阿尔及利亚要求，而应围绕IEC 61851、IEC 62196、IEC 61000、本地标签和手册、进口归类及站点审批证据建立阿尔及利亚技术文件。
summary.zht: 與成熟的歐盟和海灣充電網絡相比，阿爾及利亞EV充電市場仍處於早期階段。市場准入應通過進口商、IANOR標準與合格評定路徑、海關文件、CREG監管的電力環境、Sonelgaz電網協調，以及任何公共或車隊項目招標要求逐案處理。截至2026年6月14日，未能從官方來源確認單一、專門針對EVSE整機的強制認證路徑，因此出口商不應宣稱自動滿足阿爾及利亞要求，而應圍繞IEC 61851、IEC 62196、IEC 61000、本地標籤和手冊、進口歸類及站點審批證據建立阿爾及利亞技術文件。

standards_or_laws: IANOR Algerian standards and conformity route for electrical equipment
CREG regulatory framework for electricity and gas
Sonelgaz grid and distribution coordination for electrical installations
IEC 61851, IEC 62196, and IEC 61000 technical evidence for EV chargers

summary.en: China export packages may include GB/T 18487.1-2023 safety reports, GB/T 20234 connector evidence, GB/T 27930 communication evidence, CCC status where applicable, factory QA, and Chinese or English manuals. These documents do not by themselves establish Algeria import conformity, IANOR acceptance, Sonelgaz grid acceptance, or project-owner approval. Arabic and French documentation may be requested by the importer, customs broker, or project owner.
summary.zh: 中国出口资料包可能包括GB/T 18487.1-2023安全报告、GB/T 20234接口证据、GB/T 27930通信证据、适用时的CCC状态、工厂质量保证以及中文或英文手册。这些文件本身不能证明阿尔及利亚进口合格、IANOR接受、Sonelgaz并网接受或项目业主批准。进口商、报关行或项目业主可能要求阿拉伯语和法语文件。
summary.zht: 中國出口資料包可能包括GB/T 18487.1-2023安全報告、GB/T 20234接口證據、GB/T 27930通訊證據、適用時的CCC狀態、工廠質量保證以及中文或英文手冊。這些文件本身不能證明阿爾及利亞進口合格、IANOR接受、Sonelgaz併網接受或項目業主批准。進口商、報關行或項目業主可能要求阿拉伯語和法語文件。

gap.en: Before shipment, map the importer of record, HS code, charger type, radio or cellular functions, cable and connector accessories, IEC test reports, local labelling language, spare-parts support, and installation authority for the specific project. Confirm with IANOR or a qualified local conformity adviser whether an Algeria certificate, declaration, or inspection is required. Confirm with Sonelgaz whether the charger site requires distribution-capacity review, metering approval, commissioning inspection, or project-specific grid documentation.
gap.zh: 出货前，应明确记录进口商、HS编码、充电设备类型、无线或蜂窝功能、电缆及接口附件、IEC测试报告、本地标签语言、备件支持以及具体项目的安装主管方。应与IANOR或合格本地合规顾问确认是否需要阿尔及利亚证书、声明或检验。应与Sonelgaz确认充电站点是否需要配电容量审查、计量批准、调试检查或项目特定电网文件。
gap.zht: 出貨前，應明確記錄進口商、HS編碼、充電設備類型、無線或蜂窩功能、電纜及接口附件、IEC測試報告、本地標籤語言、備件支持以及具體項目的安裝主管方。應與IANOR或合格本地合規顧問確認是否需要阿爾及利亞證書、聲明或檢驗。應與Sonelgaz確認充電站點是否需要配電容量審查、計量批准、調試檢查或項目特定電網文件。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional and project-specific; IANOR conformity, customs import requirements, Sonelgaz grid coordination, and CREG/project-owner requirements must be confirmed for the exact charger and site
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic CCC or GB/T status is not an Algeria market-access approval

source.publisher: Commission de Regulation de l'Electricite et du Gaz (CREG)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Algeria EV charger market access should be treated as case-specific. Do not rely on China CCC, GB/T 18487, GB/T 20234, or GB/T 27930 evidence alone; confirm IANOR conformity, import documentation, Sonelgaz grid coordination, and any CREG or project-owner conditions before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 阿尔及利亚EV充电设备市场准入应按具体项目处理。不得仅依赖中国CCC、GB/T 18487、GB/T 20234或GB/T 27930证据；出货前应确认IANOR合格评定、进口文件、Sonelgaz电网协调以及任何CREG或项目业主条件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 阿爾及利亞EV充電設備市場准入應按具體項目處理。不得僅依賴中國CCC、GB/T 18487、GB/T 20234或GB/T 27930證據；出貨前應確認IANOR合格評定、進口文件、Sonelgaz電網協調以及任何CREG或項目業主條件。
